programs.programName: Texas State Health Insurance Assistance Program (SHIP)

verified.notes: SHIP/HICAP has no age, income, or asset eligibility limits; open to Medicare-eligible (65+ or disabled) and caregivers. Phone from shiphelp.org citing Texas program.

programs.notes: SHIP/HICAP has no age, income, or asset eligibility limits; open to Medicare-eligible (65+ or disabled) and caregivers. Phone from shiphelp.org citing Texas program.

verified.notes: Search results show Meals on Wheels East Texas references age 60+ and directs applicants to contact Department of Health and Human Services (1-800-458-9858) for qualification determination. Income and asset limits not specified in available search results. No official .gov source URLs provided in search results; information sourced from nonprofit program websites. Meals on Wheels Texas is a 501(c)(3) statewide association; eligibility criteria may vary by regional program.

verified.notes: Long-Term Care Ombudsman Program is an advocacy service, not a benefits program with eligibility criteria. No age, income, or asset limits apply. Services are free and available to all residents of nursing homes and assisted living facilities, their families, and facility staff. Phone number confirmed from multiple official Texas.gov sources.
